mapper.select: SELECT customer_id, name, email, password_hash, phone, address, created_at, updated_at FROM customers
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO customers (name, email, password_hash, phone, address) VALUES (#{name}, #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{phone}, #{address})
mapper.update: UPDATE customers SET name = #{name}, email = #{email}, password_hash = #{passwordHash}, phone = #{phone}, address = #{address}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE customer_id = #{customerId}
